name: MQTT Honeypot
description: Mosquitto-based MQTT honeypot package with protocol-aware proxy logging.

files.content:
services:
  honeypot:
    build: .
    container_name: mqtt-honeypot
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:${BACKEND_PORT:-11883}:1883"
    volumes:
      - ${HONEYPOT_LOGS_DIR}:/mosquitto/log
      - ${HONEYPOT_DATA_DIR}:/mosquitto/data

listener 1883
allow_anonymous true
log_type all
log_dest file /mosquitto/log/mosquitto.log
persistence true
persistence_location /mosquitto/data/
